emails.subject: brokerage accounts
emails.body: Mark: Please verify for me that you told Susan F. that Samantha would be responsible for the brokerage accounts when she joins us. I wasn't certain that Susan knew and I didn't want to spring it on her. Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: Re: brokerage accounts
emails.body: Re: brokerage accounts Yes, I spoke to her earlier this week.

emails.subject: Re: brokerage accounts
emails.body: Re: brokerage accounts Yes, I spoke to her earlier this week.
